ai_research.headline: Tesla AI5 chip tape-out sends stock surging 8% — Meta-Broadcom custom chip deal extends to 2029

items.title: Tesla AI5 chip tape-out completed — 5x FSD/Robotaxi improvement promised
items.body: Elon Musk announced AI5 chip tape-out completion, driving TSLA up ~8% to $391.95. The chip promises 5x improvements for FSD and Robotaxi, with mid-2027 launch target. AI4 already enables 'better than human safety' in FSD. UBS upgraded to Neutral ($352 PT). Spring software update adds FSD Supervised at $99/mo and 'Hey Grok' voice integration.

items.title: Meta extends Broadcom custom AI chip deal through 2029
items.body: Meta expanding partnership with Broadcom to develop multiple generations of custom AI processors, including next-gen MTIA chips for inference and ranking. Initial multi-gigawatt compute commitment. Reduces reliance on Nvidia as AI infrastructure demand explodes across Meta's apps.

items.title: Maine passes data center moratorium — first in the US
items.body: Maine's legislature passed a bill for a statewide moratorium on new data centers, driven by AI's massive energy and water demands. Awaits governor's signature. Federal pushback from Trump admin against AI regs. Similar bills in Illinois and other states.

ai_research.learn_today: Tesla's Terafab joint venture (with SpaceX) is accelerating — Intel joined, two factories planned in Austin. Musk's chip empire now spans automotive, robotics, and orbital AI. The integration across Tesla/SpaceX/xAI is the real story.

openclaw_agents.headline: Agent adoption hits 57% of orgs — infrastructure and regulation catching up

items.title: 57% of orgs now running agents in production (LangChain report)
items.body: LangChain's latest report shows 57% of organizations have agents in production, up from ~30% last year. The biggest challenges: reliability, observability, and cost control. LangGraph 1.1.7 adds lifecycle callbacks for production agent reliability.
items.try_this: If you're building agents, lifecycle callbacks are the primitive you need for production reliability. Worth a look even if you're not on LangGraph.

items.title: EU Commission pushes Google to share search data with AI chatbots
items.body: Under the Digital Markets Act, EU is requiring Google to share search data with third-party search engines and AI chatbots. Could level the playing field for smaller AI companies that need training data.

openclaw_agents.try_today: Terafab is the chip project to watch — Tesla + SpaceX + Intel building AI chips in Austin. If Musk delivers on 5x FSD improvements with AI5, the robotaxi economics change fundamentally.

tesla.note: Stock surged ~8% intraday on AI5 tape-out news. UBS upgraded to Neutral ($352 PT). Terafab chip project accelerating with Intel joining — two Austin factories planned. Spring software update ships FSD Supervised $99/mo + 'Hey Grok' voice. Q1 earnings April 22.

tesla_spacex_xai.spacex: Alphabet's 6.11% stake could be worth $120B+ at $2T valuation for confidential June IPO (targeting $75B raise, largest ever). Starship Booster 19 completed full 33-engine Raptor 3 static fire — V3 stack milestone. Musk could hit trillionaire status post-IPO.
tesla_spacex_xai.xai: Grok integrated into Tesla vehicles via spring update for hands-free queries. No standalone xAI headlines today, but Terafab chip push links Tesla/SpaceX/xAI ecosystems. xAI still dealing with NAACP lawsuit over Memphis data center pollution.

items.note: Drops tomorrow. Thriller about a father's vengeance after a road rage incident. Could be good, could be generic — Netflix thrillers are a coin flip, but the premise hooks.

items.title: Roommates (2026)
items.note: Also drops tomorrow. Comedy about clashing college freshmen turning friendship toxic. Could be the next 'The Social Network' vibe or could be forgettable.

items.title: Dandelion (2026)
items.note: Drops today. Supernatural comedy anime. Netflix's anime originals have been hit-or-miss but the premise is intriguing.

items.title: Outcome (2026)
items.note: Dark comedy with Cameron Diaz. Dropped last week but still new. If you like dark comedies with A-list casts, this is worth your time.

items.title: QuizzyDots — Tax Day angle landed yesterday, monitor engagement
items.body: Posted tax day reward angle yesterday. Check if any comments or engagement came through. Tax Day (April 15) was yesterday so engagement window may have passed, but residual traffic from r/WebGames post could still be active.

items.title: Physical AI market forecast: $3.25T by 2040
items.body: New report projects Physical AI market at $3.25T by 2040 from $383B in 2026. Spans healthcare, smart infrastructure, autonomous systems. If InstaClaw has any physical/spatial AI angles, this narrative is gaining traction.

macro.mood: TSLA surged 8% intraday on AI5 chip tape-out — biggest mover. SPY flat. BTC holding $74K. Allbirds pivoted to AI and spiked 500%+ (meme territory). Markets focused on chip wars and data center energy.
